user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Tesla
Product type: Model S electric sedan
Tone: innovative, premium, futuristic
Visual style: Sleek, minimalist design with high-contrast lighting emphasizing modernity and cutting-edge technology.
Conceptual technique: technology-driven experiential storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Drive the Future, Silently.
brief.caption: A Tesla Model S glides effortlessly through a futuristic cityscape at night, with skyscrapers illuminated by neon lights reflecting off the car's sleek, aerodynamic body. The scene emphasizes motion and innovation, with a clear, starry sky overhead suggesting limitless possibilities.
brief.visual_style: Sleek, minimalist design with high-contrast lighting emphasizing modernity and cutting-edge technology.
brief.call_to_action: Experience the future today at Tesla.com
brief.typography_style: Modern, sans-serif typeface with a clean and elegant look, slightly condensed for a sophisticated feel.
brief.color_scheme: midnight black, electric blue, and silver accents
